items.briefing:
Australian small and medium businesses are increasingly adopting AI tools, but many are doing so without proper policies or workflow oversight — a practice known as "shadow AI." Security experts are warning that unmanaged AI use creates real data privacy and compliance risks, and organisations should establish clear governance rules around which AI tools staff can use and how.

On a positive note, MobileMuster is accepting donated phones to support domestic abuse survivors — old devices should be wiped before donation. **Practical tip:** Check whether your staff are using AI tools like ChatGPT for work tasks without approval, and consider creating a simple acceptable use policy.

featured.title: Avoiding shadow AI requires strong enterprise governance
featured.quote: Unmanaged AI use is exposing Australian firms to data leakage and compliance breaches.
